FAST_RESPONSE_ONLINE_ONLY: Fast response is only available while the therapist is online (active heartbeat). Open the physiotherapist list, make sure the Online badge is shown, then submit again.
PAYMENT_PROOF_ATTACH: Attach a payment proof: upload an image (JPEG, PNG, or WebP) or provide an https link to your proof.
SOCIAL_DEACTIVATE: This account signs in via Google/Apple/GitHub/Facebook. Deactivate it through the sign-in provider or contact support.
SOCIAL_PASSWORD_UNAVAILABLE: This account signs in via Google/Apple/GitHub/Facebook. Setting a password is not available for this account yet.
